list.name: season_id
list.label: Season
list.query: SELECT season_id AS __text, season_id AS __value FROM seasons ORDER BY created_at DESC;

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (bot_id) bot_id, equity_btc, realized_pnl_btc, drawdown_pct, trade_count, fee_btc, cash_btc, ts FROM bot_metrics WHERE season_id = '${season_id}' ORDER BY bot_id, ts DESC ) SELECT bot_id, equity_btc, realized_pnl_btc, drawdown_pct, trade_count, fee_btc, cash_btc, ts FROM latest ORDER BY equity_btc DESC, realized_pnl_btc DESC;
SELECT ts AS time, equity_btc AS value, bot_id AS metric FROM bot_metrics WHERE season_id = '${season_id}' ORDER BY ts ASC;
SELECT ts, bot_id, equity_btc, realized_pnl_btc, drawdown_pct, trade_count, fee_btc FROM bot_metrics WHERE season_id = '${season_id}' ORDER BY ts DESC, bot_id ASC LIMIT 30;
SELECT ts, bot_id, symbol, side, request_price, executed_price, requested_quantity, executed_quantity, status FROM bot_orders WHERE season_id = '${season_id}' ORDER BY ts DESC, id DESC LIMIT 25;
